name: TCIL_RequestValueCommand
title: TCIL_RequestValueCommand
syntax: long TCIL_RequestValueCommand(dbNode client, dword ddi, dword elementNumber); // form 1
long TCIL_RequestValueCommand(dword addressClient, dword ddi, dword elementNumber); // form 2
long TCIL_RequestValueCommand(dbNode tc, dbNode client, dword ddi, dword elementNumber); // form 3
long TCIL_RequestValueCommand(dbNode tc, dword addressClient, dword ddi, dword elementNumber); // form 4
description: This function sends the Request Value command to the client.

parameters.name: tc
parameters.description: Task Controller simulation node to apply the function.

parameters.name: client
parameters.description: Task Controller client node the TC sends the Request Value command to.

parameters.name: addressClient
parameters.description: Address of the Task Controller client node the TC sends the Request Value command to.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
